# Time2Fly Tours & Travel Ltd

Time2Fly Tours & Travel Ltd is Uganda's premier travel agency offering affordable flight bookings, safari adventures, holiday packages, and corporate travel solutions. Based in Kampala, serving the world.

## Contact Information
- Address: Kampala, Uganda
- Phone 1: +256 759 243 331
- Phone 2: +256 783 084 521
- Email: info@time2flytnt.com
